title: BOLSIUS Misty Pink Rustic Ball Candle 8cm
features: Inspired by Nature: This rustic candle, designed by Bolsius, draws inspiration from the colors and textures of nature, making it a perfect addition to any home decor.
Unscented and Soft Light: With a large flame and soft light, these unscented candles bring a warm and cozy atmosphere to any environment, perfect for creating a relaxing ambiance in your home.
Renewed Design: The renewed rustic candles now burn even longer, ensuring you can enjoy their beauty and benefits for an extended period of time.
description: Product description About Bolsius Ball Candles This new rustic candle range from Bolsius is inspired by the colors and textures of nature. Free from palm oil or animal fat, they’re made with a plant based wax and a cotton wick. On top of that, these new renewed rustic candles now burns even longer. With a large flame and soft light, these Bolsius Rustic Ball Candles bring atmosphere to any environment. Size: 7.6cm Fragrance: Unscented Safety Warning [GENERAL] Keep out of reach of children and pets. Never leave a burning candle unattended. Keep away from flammable materials. Ensure candle is placed on a stable, heat-resistant surface. Trim wick to 1/4 inch before lighting. Do not burn for more than 4 hours at a time. Dispose of properly when only 1/2 inch of wax remains.
